dimensions.overhead_hydraulic_line_height: 12' standard, adjustable to accommodate any height ceiling or routed in-floor

specifications.synchronization: Hydraulic fluid displacement using no chains, cables, or overhead obstructions
specifications.drive_system: #646 leaf chain routed over twin bearings

features: Available with both 3 stage and 2 stage arms
Hydraulic fluid displacement synchronization - no chains, cables, or overhead obstructions
#646 leaf chain drive system routed over twin bearings
Clear and unobstructed floor access between posts
Overhead hydraulic lines adjustable to any ceiling height or routed in-floor
Mechanical safety locks starting at 4" off the floor
optional_equipment: 3" Frame Adaptors (stackable) - 4 included as standard equipment
6" Frame Adaptors (stackable) - 4 included as standard equipment
Speedlane Drive On Adaptors - converts 2 post lift into drive-on lift, ALI certified
Car Storage & Service Lifts - converts from frame contact to wheel engaging lift, standard model fits wheelbases up to 116", takes up less shop space than any 4-post lift

Turf Maintenance Equipment & Auto Service Lift - converts from frame engaging to turf maintenance lift, services cars/trucks/zero turn mowers/turf equipment/four wheelers, fits 2 stage and 3 stage arms with max wheelbase of 119.5" (on 3 stage arms), 7,000 lb capacity, ALI Certified (Accessory #009-012-001)

Backsaver - hang tires from lift swing arms, heavy rubber coating prevents damage, swings 180 degrees when not in use, 100 lb capacity, available for all Mohawk 10,000 to 20,000 lb two post lifts (Accessory #ZZ757-D)
safety_features: Mechanical Safety Locks: Automatic, all position starting at 4" off the floor
Hydraulic Safety Systems: Automatic, all position
Swing Arm Restraints: Automatic upon ascent
government_contracts: Available under discounted government contract in all 50 states
notes: Specifications subject to change without notice
Dare to Compare 10,000-12,000 LB capacity lifts - mohawklifts.com/dare2compare10k
Speedlane: No wasted time positioning arms, wheels & tires hang free for tire, brake and under vehicle service, provides full undercar access
Car Storage: Ideal for vehicle storage, keeps tires at street level for exhaust work, never needs a wheels free jack
Turf Maintenance: Services cars, trucks, zero turn mowers, turf equipment and four wheelers
Backsaver: Reduces injuries, increases shop productivity
